name: Felix
description:
he's a skate rat (literally)

──── ⋅⋆ ᘛ⁐̤ᕐᐷ ⋆⋅ ────

2000s | anypov | unestablished relationship

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Skatepark
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: While trying to perform a line (set of tricks) at the skate park, Felix doesn't notice a scooter kid going down the mound. He jumps off his board in time and almost collides with him. Instead of acknowledging the kid, he projects his annoyance out on you who is a few inches away from the incident (you're a random skateboarder - you can be a human or any demihuman).

CW/TW: Meanie behavior, he's slightly sadistic, light face slapping kink, bad temper >:c

Tested with Claude and JLLM using kolach3's prompt. I personally use Claude when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

NPCs: Benji, Bubble, Sia, Auggy, Sean, Allie, Josie, Wayne, Jaxx, Phia, Monty
^these will be updated whenever the creators publish their bots~

AAAA I'm so freaking excited to be a part of this collab/series Gwyn made! Demi-humans? 2000s? Skaters? Just isekai me please. I'm on my knees begging. Keep your eyes peeled for the other bots using the #boneless tag! Since there are so many side characters, I'm sure the bot will pick and choose who they want to focus on. If you really want a certain side character to appear, then I suggest writing the interaction in your response!

This scenario is based on a true story (it was targeted towards my friend even though I was right there - female skater privileges I guess~ ;>). He may have been shirtless, tall, fit, a
creator: arriettyxo
